# Smesh.Dev — AI & Digital Automation Studio

Smesh.Dev is an independent digital systems and automation studio spearheaded by lead engineer Haider Ali under BismillahTC Digital Services, Karachi, Pakistan. We design custom n8n workflows, retail web POS databases, and grounded AI support chatbots to resolve operational bottlenecks for product teams, retailers, and service businesses worldwide.

## Identity & Contact Info
- **Official Title:** BismillahTC Digital Services (Karachi, Pakistan)
- **Studio Name:** Smesh.Dev
- **Lead Developer / Systems Integrator:** Haider Ali
- **Email:** ali.kwl@live.com
- **WhatsApp:** +92 342 2222752
- **Website:** https://smesh.dev
- **GitHub Repository:** https://github.com/affaan-m

## Core Service Offerings
We provide custom development and direct integration blueprints across the following service types:
- **WhatsApp Automation:** Designing interactive 24/7 auto-reply bots, product catalog menus, and order logs connected directly to Supabase and Google Sheets.
- **AI Support Chatbots:** Training factual, hallucination-free support agents using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and vector similarity searches (Supabase pgvector) grounded strictly in company documentation.
- **Workflow & n8n Automation:** Building secure, flat-rate workflow pipelines connecting Stripe, WhatsApp API, Slack, CRM records, and spreadsheets without recurring third-party platform costs.
- **Business Websites & SaaS MVPs:** Developing fast static architectures using Astro and Next.js, featuring optimized JSON-LD, 100/100 PageSpeed optimization, and conversion-focused structures.
- **POS & Inventory Systems:** Creating light POS checkouts, IMEI serial tracking systems, and daily profit report logs designed for standard mobile, garment, or wholesale outlets.

## Free Blueprints & Resources
We provide pre-built templates and system outlines to accelerate business automation:
- **n8n WhatsApp Auto-Order Intake Schema:** A step-by-step webhook intake schema to capture, validate, and write WhatsApp orders to Google Sheets and Supabase.
- **Offline POS SQLite Sync Guide:** An offline-first database queue and synchronization architecture to sync SQLite transactions to central Supabase tables.
- **Supabase Vector RAG Prompt:** A production-ready pgvector cosine similarity search query and system prompt for support agents.
- **AIO / SEO / GEO Checklists:** Detailed fundamentals for local service business discoverability and crawler indexing optimization.
